name: Mysterious girl | The Cute Girl That Won't Leave Your Bed
description:
Cute and pretty girl that wont leave your bed
This girl has no name and identity, what is she? why is she even here? and will she ever leave your bed??

Its time to gather all your imagination and abilities and defeat her in her own game! Find a way to get her off your bed and finally have a good night sleep.

Or you could.. just i don't know.. do whatever you want with her..? wink

_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-

Content/Trigger/Take Warning:

Most likely depends on you.. cute ass?

All characters involved are 18+ years old!!!

_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-

Creator notes:

I think I am quite happy with how the character turned out, I hope you have fun roleplaying with it and maybe get a laugh out of it too :D

Character image has been created by AI.
